entry.title: Even Microsoft Notepad is getting AI text editing now
entry.quote: The feature, called Rewrite, is rolling out in preview to Windows Insiders and will let you use AI to “rephrase sentences, adjust tone, and modify the length of your content,”

entry.title: Elwood Edwards, voice of AOL’s iconic greeting ‘You’ve Got Mail,’ dies at 74
entry.quote: His wife, Karen, worked at Quantum Computer Services, which eventually became AOL, Edwards said in 1989, she overheard former CEO of America Online, Steve Case, discussing adding a voice to the upcoming AOL software. She volunteered her husband, and Edwards recorded the phrases on a cassette deck in his living room.

entry.title: From molecule to medicine, with Ross Rheingans-Yoo
entry.quote: What happens between academic research and patients getting access to new drugs, and how we can improve it.

entry.title: Can Laptops Be Art? The Agony And Ecstasy of the OLPC XO
entry.quote: Say hello to the One Laptop Per Child (OLPC) XO. It’s thoughtful, visionary, even inspired… and it solved none of the world’s problems.

entry.title: AI Industry is Trying to Subvert the Definition of “Open Source AI”
